description_long: This object is a short sword with a straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a pointed tip. The blade is metallic and has a smooth, reflective surface, suggesting it is made of steel or a similar metal. The crossguard is broad and colored a reddish-brown, providing protection for the hand and separating the blade from the handle. The handle is cylindrical, slightly contoured for grip, and colored in a muted brown, ending in a faceted, diamond-shaped pommel. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible ornamentation or engravings. The proportions and style suggest it could be used as a utility or ceremonial sword in an urban context.
description: A short, straight, double-edged sword with a brown contoured handle, red-brown crossguard, and a pointed steel blade. The design is simple and functional, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight, double-edged blade, the wide crossguard, and the contoured handle with a diamond-shaped pommel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the crossguard and pommel visible as narrow shapes.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the slimness of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, contoured, brown, faceted pommel, smooth surface
